overview: A premium 6-page Vietnamese bakery website for Huyền Trinh Coffee & Bake in Nha Trang. Features a beautiful pastel design with hero banner, product showcase, about story, contact info, feedback form, order form, and shopping cart.
features: Homepage with hero banner and product grid
About page with bakery story and mission
Contact page with email, phone, Zalo, WhatsApp
Cart page with total price and checkout
